title: Asset
description: A target being assessed — apex domain, single host, IP, mail server, API host, etc. Mirrors COMMANDsentry's apex-as-asset shape but adds organization linkage.

asset_id.description: Stable identifier. For domains: the apex (commandcommcentral.com). For IP-only targets: ip:<address>. For single hosts: the FQDN.

first_observed.description: Earliest scan date that observed this asset.

last_observed.description: Most recent DISCOVERY observation (asm-discover/surface, monotonic). NOT bumped by light/medium scans or finding ingestion. NULL until asm-discover has seen the asset at least once.
